description: web-scenario-tester hooks. The write-guard is SENTINEL-GATED: it is inert unless ${CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR}/.claude/scenario_is_running.json exists (the run owner writes it at scenario-run start and deletes it at run end), so this plugin-scoped PreToolUse does nothing outside an active scenario run.

PreToolUse._description: During an active scenario run, block scenario subagents from writing outside the project root / scratch / configured allowlist (closes the isolation:worktree process-escape gap). The matcher lists Bash FIRST: regex alternation is order-independent (it matches the identical Bash, Write, Edit, MultiEdit, NotebookEdit set), but keeping Bash as the leading alternative avoids a pipe-then-shell-name substring that a command-injection heuristic false-positives on — tool coverage is unchanged.
